So the three days of writing are part of the experiment. Then there's a two-week interval before the biopsy. After the biopsy, the wounds were monitored, and on the 11th day after the biopsy, they checked how many had healed. The question is about the total duration of the experiment. The three days of writing plus the two weeks (14 days) before the biopsy, and then 11 days after the biopsy. Let me add that up. Three days of writing, then two weeks (14 days) later, they get the biopsy. Then they track for 11 days after that. So total time would be 3 days + 14 days + 11 days = 28 days. That's about a month.
